summary: Comprehensive testing of Payroll Compliance Update. All 20 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend payroll page loads correctly with all new status codes (PF, PH, PA, WO, OH, LC, LOP, MP, A, R, Su, H) displayed in both attendance view and legend. Payroll calculation rules section shows the correct formula.

issues: Chart shows 'width(-1) and height(-1)' console warning - minor rendering issue with ResponsiveContainer

features_tested.payroll_endpoint_structure: PASS - GET /api/payroll?month=2026-04 returns correct structure with new fields
features_tested.new_fields_present: PASS - total_days, working_days, weekoff_pay, extra_pay, lop, final_payable_days all present
features_tested.backward_compat_fields: PASS - present_days, lop_days, absent_days, leave_days still present
features_tested.attendance_details_structure: PASS - Each day has date, day_name, is_sunday, is_holiday, status, lop_value, weekoff_value, extra_value
features_tested.holiday_detection_apr_3: PASS - Apr 3 (Good Friday) marked as holiday with OH status
features_tested.holiday_detection_apr_14: PASS - Apr 14 (Tamil New Year) marked as holiday with OH status
features_tested.holidays_excluded_from_working_days: PASS - Working days count excludes holidays
features_tested.sunday_handling: PASS - Sundays marked as WO (Week Off) with weekoff_pay counting
features_tested.valid_status_codes: PASS - All status codes are valid (PF, PH, PA, WO, OH, LC, MP, A, R, BLANK, LOP, Su, H, NA)
features_tested.future_dates_status: PASS - Future dates show Su (Sunday), H (Holiday), or NA
features_tested.summary_new_fields: PASS - Summary includes total_weekoff_pay, total_extra_pay, total_payable_days
features_tested.department_work_hours: PASS - Departments found: Research Unit, Business & Product, Support Staff
features_tested.api_performance: PASS - Payroll for 52 employees completed in under 10 seconds
features_tested.frontend_page_loads: PASS - Payroll page loads with data-testid='payroll-page'
features_tested.frontend_status_legend: PASS - All 12 status codes displayed in legend (PF, PH, PA, WO, OH, LC, LOP, MP, A, Su, H, R)
features_tested.frontend_calculation_rules: PASS - Payroll Calculation Rules section shows correct formula
features_tested.frontend_attendance_view: PASS - Attendance table shows status codes correctly
features_tested.frontend_salary_view: PASS - Salary view shows Working Days, Present, LOP, Leave, Absent columns

critical_code_review_comments: Backend calculate_payroll_for_employee() correctly implements department-based work hours (Research=11h/6h, Business=10h/5h, Support=9h/4.5h)
Backend _prefetch_payroll_data() efficiently batches DB queries (~5 queries instead of ~250 for all employees)
Backend correctly excludes holidays from working_days count
Backend correctly calculates weekoff_pay for Sundays and holidays
Backend correctly calculates extra_pay when employee works on Sunday/holiday (PF=+1, PH=+0.5)
Backend correctly implements LOP rules: A=1 day, LC=0.5, PH on working day=0.5
Backend correctly handles future dates with Su/H/NA status codes
Backend correctly handles relieved employee adjustment (last_day_payable=0 → subtract 1 day)
Frontend getStatusDisplay() correctly maps all new status codes to display colors
Frontend legend shows all 12 status codes with correct labels
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing employees and April 2026 holidays (Apr 3 Good Friday, Apr 14 Tamil New Year).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payroll Compliance Update fully implemented and tested. Key features: (1) New batch prefetch reduces ~250 DB queries to ~5 for all employees. (2) Department work hours: Research=11h/6h, Business=10h/5h, Support=9h/4.5h. (3) New status codes: PF, PH, PA, WO, OH, LC, MP, A, R, BLANK, LOP, Su, H, NA. (4) New output fields: total_days, weekoff_pay, extra_pay, final_payable_days. (5) Holidays from DB properly excluded from working days. (6) Formula: Payable Days = (Working Days - LOP) + Weekoff Pay + Extra Pay. (7) Frontend getStatusDisplay() updated to handle all new codes. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_payroll_compliance.py
